doze.configuration.tip.sleepOutside: Whether players are allowed to sleep outside.
doze.configuration.tip.minimumLight: Minimum light level required for sleep. Set to 0 to disable.
doze.configuration.tip.healthPerHour: Amount players will heal per hour slept. Set to 0 to disable.
doze.configuration.tip.hungerCost: Cost of hunger per hour hour healed during sleep. Set to 0 to disable.
doze.configuration.tip.clearEffects: Hours of sleep required to clear potion effects. Set to 0 to disable.
doze.configuration.tip.bedsExplode: Whether beds explode in dimensions like the Nether.
doze.configuration.tip.advanced: Don't mess with these unless you know what you're doing!
doze.configuration.tip.tickHour: If you use a mod that alters time, make sure this setting matches the length (in ticks) of a day.
doze.block.minecraft.bed.too_dark: You can't sleep here, it's too dark.
doze.block.minecraft.bed.dimension_nethe: You can't sleep here, it's much too warm.
doze.block.minecraft.bed.dimension_end: You can't sleep here, they won't let you...
doze.block.minecraft.bed.dimension_mod: You can't sleep in this dimension.
